calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing A New Petition

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing A New Petition
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Aug-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Olsen appeared via zoom for John Hobson (petitioner).

Counsel requested more time to file the petition, and that the petition is already signed by his client. The matter is continued to August 17, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Olsen appeared via zoom for John Obson (petitioner).

The matter is ordered off calendar.

Status for filing a new petition is set for June 15, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Olsen for executor John Hobson (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on First and Final Report of Administration of Estate and Petition for Approval Thereof, for Retaining a Reserve, and for Final Distribution.

The Court noted that the defects previously identified by the Probate Examiner had not been addressed. Mr. Olsen requested additional time to file a corrected petition. The Court continued the matter to May 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, and ordered that a corrected petition be filed no later than April 27, 2026, with courtesy copies to the Probate Examiner.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Howard Olsen appeared via zoom for John Hobson (Executor).

Mr. Olsen requested a 30-day continuance to prepare his petition for final distribution. The Court stated that the Petition for final distribution to be filed on or before May 27, 2025. The matter is continued to June 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Olsen for John Hobson, Executor (via Zoom).

Counsel reported that his client's tax return has been filed. The estate includes two bank accounts and two or three insurance policies, and a claim has been submitted by the beneficiary of the policies. Counsel requested five to six months to file the petition for final distribution. The court considered the request excessive and suggested a shortened timeline. Counsel agreed to file an inventory and appraisal within four weeks.

The court continued the status hearing to April 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Counsel was directed to file an inventory and appraisal by February 11, 2025.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Adamsky, specially appearing for Howard Olsen, as counsel to Petitioner John Hobson.

Mr. Adamsky requests a 6 month continuance to finalize the accounting. The court agrees to a 2 month continuance. The hearing is continued to January 14, 2025 at 9:00am in Department 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court dispensed with notice as to Richard Rogers, whose whereabouts are unknown. The Court stated that a sufficient effort was made by the petitioner to locate Richard Rogers. The order dispensing with notice was signed in open court. The Court then granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 5/4/21 is admitted to probate. John Hobson is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for November 12, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Jaime. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Continued To Oct-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Continued To Oct-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Howard Olsen appearing via zoom for Petitioner.

The Court noted that a number of issues have been raised by the Probate examiner, that the notes from December 19, 2022 have not been addressed, that the information regarding remote appearances was not provided, that an ex parte petition regarding the unknown whereabouts of the cousin was not filed, etc. The Petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to July 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Materials are to be filed and copies are to be provided to the examiner two weeks prior.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
